chunks.title: Genealogy from Adam to Abraham
chunks.reason: Continuous genealogical list tracing the line from Adam through Noah's sons down to Abraham.

chunks.title: Genealogy of Abraham and Isaac
chunks.reason: Focuses on the descendants of Abraham through his sons Isaac, Ishmael, and Keturah, concluding with Isaac's sons.

chunks.title: Genealogy of Esau and Edomites
chunks.reason: Lists the descendants of Esau (Edom) and the chiefs of the land of Seir.

chunks.title: Kings and Chiefs of Edom
chunks.reason: Catalogs the kings who reigned in Edom before Israel and lists their chiefs.
